prompt: Design the upsell strategy for a supplement launch. The front-end product is 'FlexiJoint Pro' (joint health, $49). Available upsell products: 'FlexiJoint Pro 3-Pack' ($119), 'Mobility Masterclass' (digital course, $27), and 'Recovery Shake Mix' (complementary product, $39). Skills 07 and 09 outputs are available with the mechanism 'Synovial Restoration Protocol.' Produce the complete upsell strategy.
expected_output: Complete upsell-strategy.yaml with position mapping (order bump, upsell 1, downsell 1), pricing cascade following descending commitment rule, congruence thread connecting each offer to the Synovial Restoration Protocol mechanism, and narrative arc across the sequence.
assertions: Every upsell position is mapped with specific product assignment
Pricing cascade follows descending commitment / ascending value rule
Congruence thread references 'Synovial Restoration Protocol' mechanism
Narrative arc connects across the full sequence
Order bump position is assigned with rationale
Downsell is a genuine alternative angle, not just cheaper
Handoff specs for U1, U2, U3 are defined

prompt: I'm selling a digital course called 'The Draw Fix' for $47 to golfers who want to fix their slice. I have two potential upsells: a video analysis service ($97) and a practice plan PDF ($17). Design the upsell strategy from this brief alone — no upstream skills were run.
expected_output: Upsell strategy produced in Mode B (standalone) with position mapping, pricing cascade, congruence mapping using the user-provided context, and a flag noting Mode B limitations.
assertions: Mode B (standalone) is correctly identified and flagged
Position mapping assigns both available products to upsell positions
Pricing cascade is logical given the $47 front-end
Congruence thread connects to the slice-fixing mechanism
Mode B limitation flag is present in the output
Handoff specs for downstream skills are provided
